programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Runner Beans. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the speedy dancing Runner Beans, who won't stand still for even one minute.
Dandelion. Children's animation. After blowing the seeds off some dandelions, Bing decides to take one to Sula. Bing negotiates many windy hazards to keep the dandelion safe.
Tiddlytubby Party. Preschool series. Tinky Winky finds a party invitation and shows it to Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po. The invitation takes flight, and they follow it to find a party.
Scarecrow. Tee and Mo build a scarecrow in the garden to frighten away the greedy bird who keeps eating their seeds. When it doesn't scare the bird, Tee decides to make the scarecrow scarier.
Peas and Quiet. Supertato and Carrot investigate strange noises in the middle of the night.
Leaf Pictures. Bing and his friends are making leaf pictures, but the wind whisks Coco's picture off the table! Bing catches it by stamping on her picture, and now Coco is angry.
Cherry Picker! The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.
Cool, Man. At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.
The Soap Opera Badge. After accidentally breaking the Chickens' TV aerial, the Squirrels recreate the final episode of their favourite soap opera.
Show and Tell. Bluey wants to know why Dad is always bossing her around!
Fancy Restaurant. Bingo and Bluey set up a romantic evening for Mum and Dad at their fancy restaurant.
The Pan-American Highway, Panama. The team must protect a sloth from Glitch's plan to build a road through the Darien Gap.
The Tale of the Saving of the Shrew. Animated series. When Mr Tod tramples on the Shrew's precious dandelions, the angry Shrew vows revenge.
The Whale Shark. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his band of explorers. Dashi is swallowed by a whale shark so the Octonauts venture inside to rescue her.
Stampolines. Children's animation. Three opens a stampoline park, where her friends have splatty fun making inky prints of all the shapes they can make.
Fred. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. When a flying-saucer crash lands, F makes a new friend.
I've Lost My Bobble Hat. While sorting through his hats, Nick realises his favourite hat is missing. Can today's Popcast song help him find it?
Special. It's a very special day for Grandad Tumble at the bus museum. Mr Tumble is mistaken for the new cleaner and sets to work. Justin Fletcher stars, with Nina Wadia and George Webster.
Ball. Bing, Sula and Pando are kicking a ball around the garden. Sula does the best kick, but Bing kicks it the wrong way. As Bing kicks it back, he accidentally breaks Flop's window!
Plate. Dee encourages a friend to say 'plate', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different plates - a red plate, spinning plates and even baby bear's plate!
My Friend Biba. Lu wants Biba to play only with her at Shell School today.
Green Thumb. Brian asks the Piggies to help grow a special little plant. With time, care and lots of love, they're amazed to see it grow incredibly big!
More About Over. Stop-motion preschool programme. At a garden fete, the Twirlywoos watch a girl try to knock over a stack of cans with three balls and help her win a prize.
Disco Party. There's a party, and you're all invited! Justin and his friend arrange a disco party with a difference, while Mr Tumble holds his own disco party at Tumble Cottage.
Rainbow. Preschool series. The Teletubbies go for a walk on a lovely sunny day, but clouds appear and it starts to rain. A rainbow path gives them a magical trail to follow.
Yellow. Giovanna and Baby Bear invite babies and their grown-ups to explore objects that are yellow through discovery, play, song and story. Babies and grown-ups at home can join in too!
Fire Station. Elsee visits a fire station with her friend Abigail and plays a game of I-spy.

programmes.show_name: New: What's in Your Plant Pot?
programmes.show_description: Chilli. Chilli farmer Amrit Madhoo reveals the surprising world of chillies.
Carrots! Rebecca and Murphi are dealing with a glut of carrots from the vegetable patch, which inspires them to make a carton bunny rabbit and a cardboard kitty cat.
I Spy. During a game of I-spy, Ginger spots something that none of the Peas can see.
Taxi. Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!
The Counting Badge. The Squirrels try the ultimate achievement of counting to 100.   Followed by Hey Duggee.
Stepping Stones and Crystal River Walk. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers pretend to be mermaids and find a crystal river on a walk to pick litter!
Iona and Elba's Wizardy Windy Day. Mum has a magical wizarding surprise waiting for Iona and Elba in the garden.
Molly's Saint Lucian Jerk Sea Bass. Molly brings the flavours of the Caribbean to her home, cooking a Saint Lucian-themed meal of jerk fish, spiced potato wedges and avocado salsa.
Part 1. Join amazing animals and CBeebies friends in the first part of this musical celebration.
Sea Lion and Capybara. Steve and Aneeshwar meet a noisy sea lion and give some capybara breakfast.
Waffle Grows. Preschool comedy drama series. On Waffle's last day at the Brooklyn-Bells', Simon hears the puppy speak. Will he now agree that the family should keep the special dog?
Silky's Seahorses. Silky finds some amazing seahorses in a rock pool.
Seasons. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The Potatoes celebrate the four seasons and sing a folksy song about the exciting things that come with each one!
Top of the Pots. Sonny and Yukee become distracted by the amazing musical properties of a pile of old salvaged pots.
Bubbles. It's bath time, and Maddie and Triggs embark on a bubble-tastic submarine adventure to the bottom of the ocean in search of Triggs's favourite bath toy, Denis the Ducky.
The Biology Badge. Duggee and the Squirrels hop inside the Biology Bus and miniaturise themselves to go on a voyage of discovery inside Enid. Can they find out what's making her cough?
Number Rescue, Go! The Numberland Rescue Team takes on a series of urgent missions for the Numberblobs.
Cowboy. Educational fun. When a cowboy rides into Alphaland, it's time for OU and OY to round up some cows.
Woof! Justin and his friends take Bonnie the dog for a wash and blow dry at the local dog groomers. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble attempts to dog train the Puppy.
Trailer. Preschool series. The Noo-Noo gets to go on a special Tubby Custard Ride in a trailer the Teletubbies have not seen before.
Cabbage. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage and his dazzling super-veggie memory skills!
Allotments. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about allotments.
New Kit. It's Sophie's first day. She worries that she's no good at football but feels like part of the team when she helps the others work together to create a fantastic new football kit.
Amazing Motorbikes. Grace shows off three amazing machines, all of which are different kinds of motorbikes.
Hot Chocolate Day. Love Monster is the sipping host for Hot Chocolate Day. He tries to make his hot chocolate special by adding pickles but realises everyone wants him to serve it as usual.
Land of Fire and Ice. The Octonauts race to save a herd of reindeer as a volcanic eruption melts a glacier.
The Tale of the Flying Fox. Animated series. Peter finds a mysterious key hidden in his father's journal and is determined to find out what it fits.
The Election Badge. When Eugene unexpectedly drops out of running the summer fair, Duggee and the Squirrels hold an election to choose the best candidate for the job.
Otto's Fancy Friend. Otto's afraid a caterpillar pal will be too fancy to be friends when she's a butterfly.
Runner Bean. Supertato and Runner Bean are competing for first place in this year's supermarket race, but Evil Pea has plans to win by cheating.
Mission Calm. The ducklings transfer Weasy's mind into the body of a snail - what could go wrong?
Rock-a-Bye Bo. Bo is tired and falls asleep in the middle of hunting for Fabio's lost inflatable fruit. It's up to Mojo to finish the job - without waking up poor, exhausted Bo!
Show and Tell. Bluey wants to know why Dad is always bossing her around!
Sink or Stink. The Piris devise a smelly solution when hungry seagulls almost capsize the iceberg.
Fancy Restaurant. Bingo and Bluey set up a romantic evening for Mum and Dad at their fancy restaurant.
Andy and the Lost Pachycephalosaurus. Andy embarks on an adventure across Dino Island in search of a baby Pachycephalosaurus.
Waffle's Dog Family. Waffle feels left out of the Brooklyn-Bells' fun, so he sets off to find his doggy family.
The Cat Wish. Rafi's wish reveals being a cat is hard, and to value Deborah's challenges.
It's Time to Dance. Gran Gran teaches JoJo the moves to a traditional Saint Lucian dance.
Rainbow Race. Animation for preschool children. The changeable weather means Rainbow has to leave before finishing his story. Sarah and Duck try to find out how the story ends.
Puffball. Animation about a family of small creatures who live on, and inside, a planet. Small makes his own space hopper, but unexpectedly it hops him into orbit!
Moth. MeMo and BaBa find a moth and are surprised that it sleeps during the day and comes out to play at night. The Yummies find ways to help the friends learn about nocturnal life.
Following. The Tombliboos are playing, but Tombliboo Eee cannot decide what to do as she doesn't want to play the drums like Tombliboo Unn or play with bricks like Tombliboo Ooo.
Mr Tumble - Wow! Said the Owl: A First Book of Colours. Join Mr Tumble for a signed story about a curious little owl who discovers a world full of colour.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Strawberry. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Strawberry, who used to be insecure but now can't wait to celebrate herself and sing her song, See the Seeds!
Voosh! Children's animation. Bing is vooshing with Hoppity around the garden, making him fly higher and higher. With one particularly enthusiastic throw, Hoppity disappears.
Take Off. Preschool series. Po collects lots of balloons and takes off into the air! Floating high above Teletubbyland, Po waves at Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa below.
Winning. Tee is having a tired day, so Mo challenges him to lots of races, allowing him to win every time. Tee loves beating Mo, but soon discovers that winning isn't everything.
Cereal Mountain. Chilli is determined to make it to the top of Cereal Mountain without the help of Supertato and his gadgets. Evil Pea tries to get there first by cheating.
Fire Engine. Bing doesn't get to sit in the fire engine but later gets to help out when Arlo is stuck.
Top Fun. Preston needs Mojo's racer top speed to get his new plane off the ground. But when his flight goes wrong, Mojo and Bo have to take to the air in Mojo's jet top to help him down!
Hey Quacky! Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.
The Mythical Creature Badge. The Squirrels find a hidden book about mythical creatures.
Dragon. Bluey asks Dad to help her draw a dragon for her story.
Piggyback. The Heelers take a long riverside walk, but Bingo's legs are tired and she wants a piggyback. To distract her, Mum and Dad invent fun games and get her little legs moving again!
Go Jet Academy: Geo Challenge. The Go Jetters test their geographic knowledge and teamwork in a maze of tricky trials.
The Tale of Cotton-Tail's Party. Animated series. When Peter gives the Shrew some worms to entice him to Cotton-tail's birthday party, he accidentally puts everyone in danger.
The Undersea Storm. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his band of explorers. Kwazii's Gup-B breaks down in a storm, but a chain of reef lobsters lends a hand.
The Whole of Me. Children's animation. The Numberblocks show us what they are made of in a song and dance all about the parts that make a whole.
Lips. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. It's bedtime for A, E, I, O and U, but there's no getting them to snuggle down.
Nigel Had a Long Neck. Nick and the Popcasters create a song about Nigel the Giraffe, who longs to see the view from the top of Primrose Hill.
Octonauts Special: The Amazon Adventure. The Octonauts travel deep down the Amazon River in search of a lost city.
Accident. Bing has a broken arm, making all of his usual activities hurt - even drinking juice!
Star. Dee encourages a friend to say 'star', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see a yellow star, a bright star, a popstar and even a shooting star!
Vacuumasaurus. Lu can't understand why Gus is afraid of the vacuum cleaner.
Bear Berry Day. It's Bear Berry Day! The Piggy Builders come up with a way to help Brian reach the top of the tree to pick berries on the special day. But Wilf wants the berries too...
More About Gone. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos are in a park, hiding under a pile of leaves to avoid the park keeper. Will he ever catch up with the Twirlywoos?
Football Skills. Justin and his friend play football while The Tumble family compete for the Tumble Cup.
Twinkle Twinkle. Preschool fun from Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies are all sleeping - apart from Tinky Winky. Tinky Winky sees a star in the sky which sings Twinkle Twinkle.
Shiny. Nigel and Baby Bear invite babies and their grown-ups to explore things that are shiny through discovery, play, song and story. Little ones and grown-ups at home can join in too!
Library. Elsee joins her friend Zakariyya at the library for a game of I-spy.

programmes.show_name: New: What's in Your Plant Pot?
programmes.show_description: Cacao. Chocolate maker Ali reveals how his cacao pods become delicious treats.
Silly Hat Party. After washing all their silly hats, Rebecca and Murphi create a clothes peg giraffe and use scraps of wool to make a fun woolly head game. Then it's party time!
Baby Banana. Ginger and the Peas look after a baby Bananaraptor, who proves to be more than a handful.
The Beach. As Mum goes for a walk along the beach, Bluey runs to catch up with her. Along the way, she has a series of encounters that both excite and test her in her first solo adventure.
The What Happened Badge. The Squirrels try and tell us what has just happened.

programmes.show_name: Hey Duggee: Top of the Pups
programmes.show_description: The First Day Song. Do you know someone who is having a first day sometime soon? Everything will be OK!
Grass Piano and Acorns Walk. On a walk to spot llamas, Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers play a grass piano and meet a badger.
Meet Eden and Ava's Family. Eden and Ava set up a beauty salon and make their very own face mask mixture. Dad pops along for a beauty treatment, but will his visit leave him feeling relaxed?
Charlotte's Irish Boxty. Charlotte makes Irish boxty for her friends using mashed and grated potato. She tops her boxty with cooked egg and serves it with tomato.
Part 2. Join amazing animals and CBeebies friends in the second part of this musical celebration.
Waffle's Paint Disaster. Preschool comedy drama series. The Brooklyn-Bells decorate Doug's bedroom. Waffle causes a green paint disaster and escapes into Mrs Hobbs's house next door.
Keeping Cosy. Mossy finds a dangerous way to keep warm on a very cold day.
On a Farm. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The Small Potatoes meet their favourite farm animals and answer the country question, what would you do on a farm?
Yeehaa! When Sonny finds an old line-dancing record, Yukee thinks it would be a mighty swell idea if the gang had a line dance in the Sunhouse.
Raindrops. When rain threatens to spoil a family camping trip, Maddie and Triggs receive a visit from a happy little raindrop, who soon has the whole gang dancing around the tent.
The Puddle Badge. Happy sees a very questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in.
The Best House Band in Numberland. In this musical, Numberblocks Six, Seven, Eight, Nine and Ten sing about parts and wholes, and the numbers they have inside them.
An Alphablocks Adventure. In the Alphablocks' new play, a giant threatens to topple the town with his exuberant kicking. Can the townsfolk find somewhere for him to play football?
Fruity Fun. Justin and friends go fruit picking, and Aunt Polly judges the Fabulous Fruit Competition.
Say Hello. Preschool series. Tinky Winky and Laa-Laa are in Home Dome when the Tubby Phone rings. It is Dipsy and Po calling from the Tubby Mobile to say hello.
Banana. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Banana revealing yet another astonishing secret about herself in the opera piece, I've Got a Secret.
Dandelions. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about dandelions.
Stinky Socks. Elvis refuses to play football after his lucky, stinky socks are washed. Evie B leads the hunt for the smelliest smell in the Den so they can make the socks stinky again.
Tracked Machines. Series for young children that celebrates many different kinds of amazing machines. In this episode, CBeebies' Grace shows off three extraordinary machines that have tracks!
Harvest Day. Love Monster has to judge the Harvest Day talent contest, but there is only one prize and three teams, and he can't decide which of his friends deserves to win.
Beetle Invasion. Calico Jack and Kwazii attempt to move bombardier beetles to a more hospitable island.
The Tale of the True Friends. Animated series. When Benjamin is impressed by Lily's cleverness, Peter mistakenly thinks they no longer need him in the gang.
The Game Show Badge. The Squirrels have played all of their board games, so Duggee entertains them by putting on a game show, with some help hosting from his good friend Ladybug.
Fergie's Wobbly Wheel. When Fergie's wheelchair breaks from doing an awesome trick, Vida asks Grandpa Beaver to make her a new one so that she can get even better and do more tricks.
The Evil Peamobile. Evil Pea builds her own Evil Peamobile - and it has even more gadgets than the Tatocar!
Mission Popcorn. Weasy keeps munching popcorn and doesn't realise that he's depriving the ducklings of their breakfast! The ducklings must take matters into their own hands.
Dino Dig. Mojo's got the perfect top for digging up the bones of a Swoppitus Rex. But could an actual dinosaur still be alive under Jackson's field, or is it a case of mistaken identity?
Dragon. Bluey asks Dad to help her draw a dragon for her story.
Looph's Frosty Feelings. When Looph unexpectedly loses a science competition, the Piris worry about her reaction.
Piggyback. The Heelers take a long riverside walk, but Bingo's legs are tired and she wants a piggyback. To distract her, Mum and Dad invent fun games and get her little legs moving again!
Andy and the Quetzalcoatlus Egg. Andy embarks on an epic adventure across Dino Island to return a Quetzalcoatlus egg back to its nest and reunite it with its family before it hatches.
First Aid Waffle. Waffle's paw is hurt in Poodles' Class, so vet Jess trains Mr Nolan in doggy first aid.
The Unicorn Wish. Rafi's unicorn wish brings exciting quests, but she realises even heroes need rest - and the best adventures can be found at home.
It's Time to See a Rainbow. JoJo spots a rainbow in the park, but when it disappears, Gran Gran has a plan to create their own rainbow at home!
Perimeter Pals. Animation for preschool children. Sarah, Duck and Bug set off on a big adventure through uncharted territory as they attempt to cycle all the way around the park.
The Disappearing Nest. Animation about small creatures who live on, and inside, a planet. The Iron Chicken invites the Wols to supper, only to find that her nest has disappeared!
Helping. MeMo helps BaBa see a caterpillar. BaBa uses a GoGo Brick to build a tower. MeMo and BaBa help the Yummies, and Fungi and Pungi help MeMo and BaBa on the Lullaby Lake.
Look What the Ball Did! The ball bounces all over the garden. It accidentally knocks over Makka Pakka's pile of stones, so Makka Pakka rebuilds it and tries to protect it.
Matt Berry - The Busy Beaver. Matt Berry reads a Bedtime Story all about a busy beaver who finds himself on the wrong side of a falling tree.
